chunks.text:
## Bakery — added online ordering
A local bakery relied entirely on walk-in customers and phone orders. We added an online ordering and pickup system to their existing website. Within three months they were taking over 120 online orders a month — a completely new revenue stream they previously had no way to capture.

## Plumber — local SEO
A plumbing company was effectively invisible on Google outside of paid ads. We optimized their Google Business Profile and built location-specific service pages for each area they cover. They reached the first page of local search for their main service area and roughly doubled their inbound call volume.

## Law firm — mobile-first redesign
A law firm had an outdated, desktop-only website that looked broken on phones — where most of their traffic actually came from. We rebuilt it mobile-first with clear calls to action and simplified navigation. Mobile enquiries increased by about 60 percent after launch.

## Restaurant — reservation site and paid ads
A new restaurant needed bookings quickly. We built a simple menu-and-reservation website and ran a targeted local Meta ad campaign. They filled their opening month and kept a steady flow of weekend reservations afterward.

## To a restaurant with no online ordering
We noticed the business relied only on phone calls and walk-ins, with no way to order or book online. We opened by pointing that out plainly, then referenced our bakery result — over 120 online orders a month — and asked for a short 15-minute call. Being specific about the missing capability, rather than generic praise, is what earned the reply.

## To a business with an outdated mobile site
We led with the observation that most of their visitors were on phones while their site was hard to use on a small screen, which means lost enquiries. We tied it to our law-firm redesign result of roughly 60 percent more mobile enquiries, and offered to show them what a mobile-first version could look like. One concrete observation plus one concrete result works better than listing services.

## General principle that works
The outreach that gets replies names one real problem visible on the prospect's own site, connects it to one relevant result we have delivered, and makes a single low-friction ask. It never uses flattery, never lists every service, and never invents numbers.

## Website design and redesign
We design and rebuild fast, mobile-friendly websites that load in under two seconds and look right on every screen. Ideal for businesses with outdated, slow, or non-responsive sites that lose visitors on mobile.

## Local SEO
We help local businesses rank in Google Maps and local search so nearby customers can actually find them. This includes Google Business Profile optimization, location-specific service pages, local keywords, and a review-generation strategy.

## Paid advertising
We run and manage Google Ads and Meta (Facebook and Instagram) advertising campaigns focused on measurable lead generation and return on ad spend, not vanity metrics.

## Content and copywriting
We write clear website copy, landing pages, and blog content that turns visitors into enquiries instead of leaving them confused about what a business actually does.

## E-commerce and online ordering
We add online stores, booking systems, and online ordering to existing sites, so businesses can take orders, reservations, and payments directly instead of relying only on phone calls and walk-ins.
